config_snapshot.dataset: CIFAR-10 probe data (3 seeds x 100 points)
config_snapshot.note: Reanalysis from aggregated statistics, no GPU needed
Includes env setup + training + hessian verification

config_snapshot.methods: EK-FAC IF + K-FAC IF (manual) + RepSim + TRAK (manual proj)
config_snapshot.note: Pilot mode. Layer4+fc only due to GPU memory sharing. Full-model needs dedicated GPU.

config_snapshot.methods: Two-way ANOVA (Type I sequential) on J10, tau, LDS
config_snapshot.note: Pilot mode. Uses phase1_attribution_compute outputs. Gate PASS.
Pilot mode. 20 epochs per seed (sequential on 1 GPU). All 4 seeds healthy. GO for full 200-epoch run.
Pilot mode. 1 seed (42), 100 test points. BSS computation feasible in ~71s. Eigenvalue scale much smaller than expected (max 5e-5 vs spec threshold 100). Adapted thresholds used.

config_snapshot.analyses: H-D1 (incomplete, 1 seed), H-D2 (partial corr BSS vs LDS), H-D3 (ANOVA BSS ~ class)
config_snapshot.overall_gate: PASS (H-D3 passes, H-D2 fails, H-D1 incomplete)
config_snapshot.note: Pilot mode. BSS strongly correlates with gradient norm (rho=0.91). Partial correlation with LDS drops to ~0 after controlling for grad_norm. Within-class BSS variance is 93.5% — BSS is not a class detector but may be a gradient-norm proxy.

Pilot mode. IF dominates RepSim for ALL 100 points (layer4+fc setting). Binary AUROC undefined. Quantile-based AUROC (median split on LDS_diff magnitude) used as substitute. Strong tau-LDS_diff correlation (rho=-0.55) confirms disagreement is informative.

Pilot mode. LOO on tiny subsets (50/500 train). Models severely undertrained. All LOO-TDA correlations near zero. Structural validation weak (top10 same-class 1.4/10). Root cause: insufficient training data and epochs produce noisy loss landscapes. Full-scale LOO on 5K with 200-epoch models needed for meaningful results.

config_snapshot.methods: Identity IF + K-FAC IF + EK-FAC IF + RepSim + TRAK-10 + TRAK-50 + 0.5:0.5 ensemble
config_snapshot.note: Pilot mode. 100 test points, 5K train. Identity IF computed from scratch (7.2min). All other methods use cached Phase 1 data. TRAK-10 = TRAK-1 in pilot (no 10 checkpoints). GO for Phase 3 adaptive strategies.

config_snapshot.analyses: H-A1 (uncertainty non-redundancy), H-A2 (stability vs correctness), H-A3 (ensemble TRV stability)
config_snapshot.note: Pilot mode. H-A1 FAILS because |tau| and entropy are correlated (both capture prediction uncertainty). H-A2 FAILS because |tau| has genuine partial correlation with LDS even after class+grad_norm control. H-A3 PASSES: ensemble averaging stabilizes TRV rankings. Full experiment needs proper U_geodesic (cross-seed variance) and U_curvature (Laplace posterior).

config_snapshot.gpu_model: N/A (CPU only, no GPU compute needed)
config_snapshot.gate: GO (all strategies valid, AUROC computable, adaptive close to uniform)
config_snapshot.note: Pilot mode. IF universally dominates RepSim in layer4+fc setting, so routing cannot improve over pure IF. Routing signals ARE informative about IF advantage magnitude. Full-model experiment needed for meaningful adaptive selection.
